name: Mapillary (Meta)
description: Mapillary (Meta) — Crowdsourced street-level imagery platform with computer vision annotations and map data.

seo.title: Mapillary (Meta) — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Mapillary (Meta): Mapillary (Meta) — Crowdsourced street-level imagery platform with computer vision annotations and map data.

when_to_use: Crowdsourced street-level imagery for map data enrichment
Computer vision annotations on road signs and infrastructure
Training datasets for autonomous vehicle and map AI systems
Building location apps with street-view imagery at scale
Supplementing Google Street View with open imagery data

pros: Free access to crowdsourced street imagery
Computer vision labels useful for ML training
Useful supplement when Street View missing
cons: Coverage uneven vs Google Street View
Image quality varies wildly by contributor
review.verdict: Valuable open alternative to Street View; future uncertain under Meta ownership.
review.best_for: Researchers and ML teams needing street imagery at no cost
review.not_for: Products that require guaranteed coverage SLAs
